title: Logical error: 'No such column in schema: c2 (schema: )' with DeltaLake table
description:
### Describe the bug
Time to use `spark.py` again.
### How to reproduce
Run [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22027482/spark.py), then in ClickHouse with [users.xml](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22027525/users.xml):
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Nullable(Int32), c1 Int32 NULL, c2 Float32) ENGINE = DeltaLakeLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/spark_catalog/test.db/t0/');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c2, c1, c0) SELECT c2, c1, c0 FROM generateRandom('c2 Float32, c1 Int32, c0 Nullable(Int32)', 10302214459765367351, 5192, 2) LIMIT 7;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0, c1, c2) SELECT c0, c1, c2 FROM generateRandom('c0 Nullable(Int32), c1 Int32, c2 Float32', 10032750097652499525, 2709, 3) LIMIT 85;
SELECT 1 FROM deltaLakeLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/spark_catalog/test.db/t0/', structure = 'c2 Float32, c0 Nullable(Int32), c1 Int32 NULL') AS tx WHERE tx.c2 = 1 SETTINGS allow_experimental_delta_kernel_rs = 0;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 DATETIME, c3 DOUBLE) ENGINE=InnoDB;
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, NULL, NOW(), 3.14);

INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2, c3) SELECT number, CAST(number % 10 AS CHAR), NOW() + INTERVAL number SECOND, number * 1.1 FROM (SELECT @row := @row + 1 AS number FROM (SELECT @row := -1) r CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10) t) AS numbers;
SELECT c0, c1, c3 FROM t1 WHERE c3 > 2.0 AND c1 IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE t2 (c0 INT NULL, c1 INT, c2 FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0) ENGINE=InnoDB;
key_bug_features: No such column in schema: c2 with DeltaLake table
